\tzpentry{ID3590}{Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3590 introduces Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} T_{\text{gyro}} = \frac{1}{2} \vec{\omega}_{\text{gyro}} \cdot (I_{\text{gyro}} \cdot \vec{\omega}_{\text{gyro}}) + \frac{1}{2} m_{\text{total}} \dot{\vec{r}}_{\text{cm}} \cdot \dot{\vec{r}}_{\text{cm}} \end{equation}
